title: GitHub Copilot Metrics Schema
description: JSON Schema for GitHub Copilot usage metrics, aggregated metrics reports, and usage report download objects returned by the Copilot REST API.

CopilotMetricsDay.title: Copilot Metrics Day
CopilotMetricsDay.description: Aggregated Copilot usage metrics for a single day, broken down by feature area, editor, programming language, and AI model.

date.description: The date these metrics apply to in YYYY-MM-DD format.

total_active_users.description: Total number of users with any Copilot activity on this date.

total_engaged_users.description: Total number of users who actively engaged with Copilot features on this date.

copilot_ide_code_completions.description: Metrics for Copilot code completions in IDEs. Null if no data available.

copilot_ide_chat.description: Metrics for Copilot Chat in IDEs. Null if no data available.

copilot_dotcom_chat.description: Metrics for Copilot Chat on github.com. Null if no data available.

copilot_dotcom_pull_requests.description: Metrics for Copilot pull request summaries on github.com. Null if no data available.

CopilotIdeCodeCompletions.title: IDE Code Completions
CopilotIdeCodeCompletions.description: Aggregated metrics for Copilot code completions across IDEs, including breakdowns by language, editor, and model.

total_engaged_users.description: Total users who accepted at least one code completion suggestion.

CodeCompletionsEditor.title: Code Completions Editor
CodeCompletionsEditor.description: Code completion metrics for a specific IDE or editor.

name.description: Name of the editor (e.g., vscode, jetbrains, neovim, vim, xcode).

total_engaged_users.description: Number of users who engaged with code completions in this editor.

models.description: Metrics broken down by AI model used.

CodeCompletionsModel.title: Code Completions Model
CodeCompletionsModel.description: Code completion metrics for a specific AI model, with per-language detail.

name.description: Name of the AI model (e.g., 'default' or a specific model identifier).

is_custom_model.description: Whether this is a custom fine-tuned model.

custom_model_training_date.description: Training date of the custom model. Null for non-custom models.

total_engaged_users.description: Number of users who engaged with this model.

languages.description: Detailed code completion metrics per programming language.

CodeCompletionsLanguageMetrics.title: Code Completions Language Metrics
CodeCompletionsLanguageMetrics.description: Detailed code completion metrics for a specific programming language, including suggestion and acceptance counts.

total_engaged_users.description: Number of users who engaged with completions in this language.

total_code_suggestions.description: Total number of code completion suggestions shown to users.

total_code_acceptances.description: Total number of code completion suggestions accepted by users.

total_code_lines_suggested.description: Total lines of code suggested across all completions.

total_code_lines_accepted.description: Total lines of code accepted by users from completions.

CopilotIdeChat.title: IDE Chat
CopilotIdeChat.description: Aggregated metrics for Copilot Chat interactions in IDEs.

total_engaged_users.description: Total users who prompted Copilot Chat in an IDE.

IdeChatEditor.title: IDE Chat Editor
IdeChatEditor.description: IDE Chat metrics for a specific editor.

total_engaged_users.description: Number of users who engaged with Chat in this editor.

IdeChatModel.title: IDE Chat Model
IdeChatModel.description: IDE Chat metrics for a specific AI model, including conversation and interaction counts.

is_custom_model.description: Whether this is a custom fine-tuned model.

custom_model_training_date.description: Training date of the custom model. Null for non-custom models.

total_engaged_users.description: Number of users who engaged with this model in Chat.

total_chats.description: Total number of chat conversations initiated.

total_chat_insertion_events.description: Number of times chat suggestions were inserted into code.

total_chat_copy_events.description: Number of times chat responses were copied by users.

CopilotDotcomChat.title: Dotcom Chat
CopilotDotcomChat.description: Aggregated metrics for Copilot Chat on github.com.

total_engaged_users.description: Total users who engaged with Copilot Chat on github.com.

DotcomChatModel.title: Dotcom Chat Model
DotcomChatModel.description: Chat metrics for a specific AI model on github.com.

is_custom_model.description: Whether this is a custom fine-tuned model.

custom_model_training_date.description: Training date of the custom model. Null for non-custom models.

total_engaged_users.description: Number of users who engaged with this model.

CopilotDotcomPullRequests.title: Dotcom Pull Requests
CopilotDotcomPullRequests.description: Aggregated metrics for Copilot pull request summaries on github.com.

total_engaged_users.description: Total users who generated pull request summaries.

repositories.description: Pull request summary metrics by repository.

PullRequestRepository.title: Pull Request Repository
PullRequestRepository.description: Pull request summary metrics for a specific repository.

total_engaged_users.description: Number of users who generated PR summaries in this repository.

models.description: PR summary metrics by AI model.

PullRequestModel.title: Pull Request Model
PullRequestModel.description: Pull request summary metrics for a specific AI model.

is_custom_model.description: Whether this is a custom fine-tuned model.

custom_model_training_date.description: Training date of the custom model. Null for non-custom models.

total_pr_summaries_created.description: Total number of pull request summaries generated.

total_engaged_users.description: Number of users who generated PR summaries with this model.

MetricsLanguageSummary.title: Language Summary
MetricsLanguageSummary.description: Summary engagement count for a single programming language.

total_engaged_users.description: Number of users who engaged with Copilot for this language.

UsageReportDaily.title: Usage Report Daily
UsageReportDaily.description: Download links for a daily Copilot usage metrics report. Links are signed URLs with limited expiration.

download_links.description: Signed URLs to download the report files.

report_day.description: The date the report covers in YYYY-MM-DD format.

UsageReport28Day.title: Usage Report 28-Day
UsageReport28Day.description: Download links for a 28-day aggregated Copilot usage metrics report. Links are signed URLs with limited expiration.

download_links.description: Signed URLs to download the report files.

report_start_day.description: Start date of the 28-day reporting period.

report_end_day.description: End date of the 28-day reporting period.
